creator: parappanon@airmail.cc
text:
Created attachment 249759
The options I chose for emulators/mame with poudriere

Hello.

I compiled emulators/mame today with poudriere using a custom
configuration that built it with SSE2 and the tools, as well as an
optimization for faster binaries since I'm intending to use MAME to
emulate the game Um Jammer Lammy NOW!

However, after spending 12 hours compiling everything I've found out
that despite having enabled the TOOLS option, none of the tools MAME
supposedly includes if you choose that option were actually installed.

For example, chdconvert should be an actual binary that gets built and installed if you enable the TOOLS option, but I didn't even have it.

I don't really think this should be happening if I selected the TOOLS
option... could this be fixed?

--
--Parappa Anon
